name: File Extension Associations
categoryDescription: Application installation, execution history, compatibility configuration, and OS version information.
description: Per-user file extension handler overrides — user can override the default application for any file extension.
forensic_value: Attackers override file extension handlers to redirect document opens to malicious executables — e.g., .pdf opens a payload instead of Acrobat. Per-user override in HKCU takes precedence over HKLM defaults without admin rights.
